data.title: BlackRock Registers Bitcoin Premium Income ETF in Delaware
data.description: According to PANews, BlackRock has registered the 'iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF' in Delaware. The entity is classified as a statutory trust, with BlackRock Advisors, LLC serving as the registered agent. The ETF was established on September 25, 2025, and aims to offer investors premium income related to Bitcoin.

data.title: Bitwise Files for Hyperliquid HYPE ETF: Here is Everyhting You Need to Know
data.description:

"Bitwise Asset Management has officially submitted the necessary documentation to regulatory authorities for the establishment of the Hyperliquid HYPE Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF). In this comprehensive guide, we explore all the essential details, implications, and what investors should consider before engaging with this innovative financial product. From the underlying assets and market strategies to potential risks and opportunities, here is everything you need to know about the new Hyperliquid HYPE ETF."
source: https://blocknews.com/bitwise-files-for-hyperliquid-hype-etf-here-is-everyhting-you-need-to-know/

data.title: BlackRock files to launch Bitcoin Premium Income ETF
data.description:
BlackRock has filed for a Bitcoin premium income ETF in Delaware. The application was submitted today. The goal is to launch a fund that pays investors income using premiums tied to Bitcoin. This isn’t the same kind of product as their earlier spot Bitcoin ETF. It’s built to hand out actual income, not track the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/blackrock-launch-bitcoin-premium-income-etf/

data.title: BlackRock’s $12.5T Bitcoin ETF Filing Shakes Markets — Is Approval Imminent?
data.description:
BlackRock has filed for a Bitcoin Premium Income ETF, a covered-call fund to offer yield, expanding its suite of crypto products after the success of its spot Bitcoin and Ether funds.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/blackrocks-12-5t-bitcoin-etf-filing-shakes-markets-is-approval-imminent/

data.title: Payments Platform Bolt Announces New ‘SuperApp’ Combining Traditional Finances With Crypto
data.description:
A leading payments platform is launching a new smartphone application promising to effortlessly combine crypto with traditional financing. On Tuesday, Bolt launched its new SuperApp, a platform that combines payments, banking, crypto trading, rewards and shopping into one application.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/25/payments-platform-bolt-announces-new-superapp-combining-traditional-finances-with-crypto/

data.title: Why is the Crypto Market Dumping Today? Bitcoin, Ethereum, and the Fed
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market is experiencing a significant downturn today, raising questions about the underlying reasons for this drastic shift. Notably, major players in the crypto space, such as Bitcoin and Ethereum, are also seeing substantial declines in their values. This fluctuation in the market can be attributed to various factors, including recent developments from the Federal Reserve, which may have influenced investor sentiment and trading strategies. Understanding these dynamics is crucial for anyone looking to navigate the current landscape of cryptocurrency investments effectively.
source: https://blocknews.com/why-is-the-crypto-market-dumping-today-bitcoin-ethereum-and-the-fed/

data.title: White House considers new pro-crypto names for CFTC, moving on from Brian Quintenz
data.description:
The White House is weighing new candidates to lead the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) as the confirmation of Brian Quintenz, Donald Trump’s original pick, remains stalled. Eleanor Terrett, journalist and host of Crypto in America, shared a scoop on X that former CFTC commissioner Jill Sommers and National Credit Union Administration (NCUA) chair Kyle […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/white-house-new-pro-crypto-names-for-cftc/

data.title: Ethereum On-Chain Bloodbath: Rugs And Scams Erode Retail Confidence, What To Know
data.description:
The on-chain ecosystem of Ethereum has recently been rocked by a wave of scams and rug pulls, creating a period that many are describing as a bloodbath. While the underlying technology of the ETH blockchain remains robust and secure, the sheer volume of malicious projects and deceptive schemes is taking a significant toll on retail investor confidence. Is Ethereum Still The Home Of DeFi Innovation? The Ethereum on-chain ecosystem has been plagued by scams and rug pulls, resulting in significant financial losses and, more importantly, a decline in retail investor confidence. Analyst known as Fat Tony on X has expressed deep frustration that BOOE hasn’t gotten more support from Ethereum’s own community, possibly due to the wave of malicious acts on the ETH ecosystem
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-on-chain-bloodbath/

data.title: Taiwan removes South Africa from chip export blacklist
data.description:

However, the move has been noted by many who believe it sets a precedent, noting that Taiwan could be getting influenced by the US to weaponize its chip-making capabilities. Taiwan suspended its […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/taiwan-removes-south-africa-from-blacklist/
